subtitle.en: Connect each term to its meaning

tagline.en: Eight terms, eight meanings — link them up
tagline.zh: 八個術語、八個意思，把它們連起來

right.en: Servers located close to your users
Caches content near users for faster loads
right.zh: 把內容快取到使用者附近，載入更快
不用管伺服器就能執行程式碼

right.en: Startup delay when idle code first runs
right.zh: 閒置的程式第一次啟動時的延遲

right.en: Data leaving the cloud, often billed
right.zh: 資料流出雲端，通常要收費

right.en: How long cached data stays valid
right.zh: 快取資料的有效存活時間

right.en: Never trust, always verify every request
right.zh: 永不信任，每次請求都要驗證

right.en: One IP routed to the nearest server
right.zh: 同一個 IP 導向最近的伺服器
